'''Vanguard One''' was the [[callsign]] of the first member of the [[New Republic]]'s [[Vanguard Squadron]].<ref name="Squadrons" />

{{Nr-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Vanguard One appears in the [[2020]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Squadrons]]''.<ref name="Squadrons" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Squadrons]]'' {{1st}}
